mapper.select: SELECT ID, NODE_NAME, LOOP_BACK_ADDR, MGMT_ADDR FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODE
SELECT ID, IF_NAME, NODE_ID, IP_ADDR, HW_IF_ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE
SELECT ID, SIF_ID, RIF_ID, OSPF_METRIC, USAGED FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK

SELECT ID AS id, IF_ID AS ifId, TX_BIT_RATE AS txBitRate , RX_BIT_RATE AS rxBitRate, TX_PKT_RATE AS txPktRate , RX_PKT_RATE AS rxPktRate, MEASURED_DATETIME AS measuredDatetime FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC WHERE ID > #{id} ORDER BY MEASURED_DATETIME
SELECT ID AS id, CPU_USAGE AS cpuUsage , MEM_USAGE AS memUsage, NODE_ID AS nodeId, MEASURED_DATETIME AS measuredDatetime FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODEFACTOR WHERE ID > #{id} ORDER BY MEASURED_DATETIME
